description: Latest HbA1c (%) auto-synced from the most recent CRM Lab Profile row. Read-only headline metric for list/sort; full lab history lives in the Lab child table.
label: Latest HbA1c
name: CRM Lead-custom_latest_hba1c

description: The Acefone tenant that placed/received this call (set on outbound by routing, on inbound by DID match). Used to pick the right token for recording fetch.
label: Acefone Account
name: CRM Call Log-custom_acefone_account

description: Route this account through WATI (not Meta).
label: Is WATI Account
name: WhatsApp Account-custom_is_wati

description: WABA number for this tenant (inbound routing key).
label: WATI Channel Number
name: WhatsApp Account-custom_wati_channel_number

description: This agent's Acefone agent/follow-me number (digits). Used to map inbound calls to the Frappe user and as the bridge leg for click-to-call.
label: Acefone Number
name: CRM Telephony Agent-acefone_number

description: Same mobile number is also a lead in these product lines / programs (agent awareness). Computed live.
label: Other Programs (same patient)
name: CRM Lead-custom_patient_other_programs
options: ("; ".join(sorted({(r.custom_vertical or "?") + " / " + (r.custom_current_program or "?") for r in frappe.get_all("CRM Lead", filters={"mobile_no": doc.mobile_no, "name": ["!=", doc.name or ""]}, fields=["custom_vertical","custom_current_program"], ignore_permissions=True)}))) if doc.mobile_no else ""

description: Main lifecycle stage for this lead (per program). Options are the CRM Lead Stage rows for the lead's program with no substage_of. The native CRM Lead Status pill is hidden; stage/substage carry the real lifecycle.
label: Stage
name: CRM Lead-custom_stage

description: Main lifecycle stage for this lead (per program). Options are the CRM Lead Stage rows for the lead's program with no substage_of. The native CRM Lead Status pill is hidden; stage/substage carry the real lifecycle.
label: Main Stage
name: CRM Lead-custom_main_stage

description: Height in feet auto-synced from the most recent CRM Lab Profile row. Read-only; feeds the virtual BMI.
label: Height (ft)
name: CRM Lead-custom_height_feet

description: Body Mass Index, computed (not stored) from the synced Height (ft) and Weight (kg). feet -> metres = ft * 0.3048; BMI = kg / m^2. Blank until both are present.
label: BMI
name: CRM Lead-custom_bmi
options: frappe.utils.flt(doc.custom_weight_kg) / (frappe.utils.flt(doc.custom_height_feet) * 0.3048 * frappe.utils.flt(doc.custom_height_feet) * 0.3048) if (frappe.utils.flt(doc.custom_height_feet) and frappe.utils.flt(doc.custom_weight_kg)) else None

description: Date of the most recent CRM Lab Profile row, auto-synced. Read-only headline metric for sorting by report recency.
label: Last Report Date
name: CRM Lead-custom_last_report_date

description: Age in completed years, computed (not stored) from custom_dob. Blank if no DOB.
label: Age
name: CRM Lead-custom_age

description: Weight in kg auto-synced from the most recent CRM Lab Profile row. Read-only; feeds the virtual BMI.
label: Weight (kg)
name: CRM Lead-custom_weight_kg

description: Latest fasting blood sugar (mg/dL) auto-synced from the most recent CRM Lab Profile row. Read-only headline metric.
label: Latest FBS
name: CRM Lead-custom_latest_fbs

label: Program Lifecycle Stage
name: CRM Lead-custom_program_lifecycle_stage
options:
New
Doc Pending
Doc Approved
Cycle Active
Treatment Paused
Treatment Complete
Discontinued
Lost
Junk

description: Tick if this program uses the Drug Program (chemo-cycle) profile. Drives the lead Data-tab section gate. Config, not code — a new oncology program just ticks this.
label: Is Drug Program
name: CRM Program-custom_is_drug_program

description: Set when this file's bytes live in Azure Blob, not on local disk.
label: Uploaded to Azure
name: File-custom_uploaded_to_azure

description: WATI internal message id of the WhatsApp media this file came from. The join key Refresh uses to re-link a file without duplicating it.
label: WhatsApp Message ID
name: File-custom_wa_message_id
